system.description:
Discipline: Qinggong
Skill: Athletics against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You leap high into the air and land upon your foe, smashing down on their body and pinning them by digging your fingers into their joints. On a success you do 1d10 Damage per Rank Qinggong and you pin the target (as per the restrain rules) for 1 round. For any further pinning you must make a normal Grapple roll. On a Total Success you add +1d10 to Damage. Cathartic: Works as normal except the Damage is increased to 2d10 per Rank, and you may pin the person for up to a number of rounds equal to your Qi, provided that is all you do (you cannot Attack or perform any other skill action during this time). The target is not able to make the usually attempt to escape unless he or she has at least twice your Ranks in Qi.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: You must make a normal Grapple roll.
